name: pullerbear
description: An extension that notifies the user to do a git pull when they first open the project. It will also explain what they just pulled and warn about any potential errors

pullerBear.apiKey.description: OpenRouter API key for AI summarization. Get one at https://openrouter.ai/settings/keys

pullerBear.model.description: OpenRouter model slug used for summaries and chat, for example openai/gpt-4.1-mini or openrouter/free

pullerBear.fetchIntervalMinutes.description: How often to check for new commits (in minutes)

pullerBear.commitWindowMinutes.description: Time window to track commit frequency (in minutes)

pullerBear.warningCommitThreshold.description: Show warning when commits exceed this threshold

pullerBear.hardStopCommitThreshold.description: Stop AI summarization when commits exceed this threshold

pullerBear.branchRef.description: Remote branch target to compare against (e.g., upstream, main)

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
